# nightshift-ai

## Reference

Changelog — Release notes are generated from commit messages by nx release; this page points to the canonical GitHub Releases and plugin changelogs. — docs/changelog/index.md

## Explanation

What is the gtm plugin — Why the gtm plugin exists, how its commands and agents relate, and how it mirrors the sdlc plugin — docs/concepts/what-is-the-gtm-plugin.md
